grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Cites incorrect section numbers (9.1, 13.6) instead of the required 5.14 and 5.5

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Specifically mentions Halifax (70 years), Nationwide (55 years), and other major lenders' minimum lease requirements

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Mentions enforcement prospects generally but does not discuss the specific 4-year/10-year enforcement time limits

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'obtaining indemnity insurance' as a way to resolve the building regulations issue

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: References specific Handbook provisions, lender requirements, and certification procedures rather than generic conveyancing advice
